prose:
**Fukui reactivity indices (GFN2-xTB)**
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (xtb) single‐point calculation on ferrocene.xyz;  
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz` (no optimization);  
Solvent: gas phase; Charge 0, Multiplicity 1;  
Software: xtb (GFN2-xTB Hamiltonian), run via chemkit fukui subcommand;  
SCF converged; no warnings reported.  

Most electrophilic site (highest f₊): atom 11 (Fe) with f₊ = 0.22885456  
Most nucleophilic site (highest f₋): atom 11 (Fe) with f₋ = 0.25938191  
Dual descriptor at Fe (f₊–f₋): –0.030527354  

Command (CLI invocation):  
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui   \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz   \
  --method xtb --charge 0 --mult 1   \
  --stdout path --out ferrocene_fukui_xtb.json
```  
Output JSON: `./ferrocene_fukui_xtb.json`  
Plot (bar chart of f₊/f₋/dual): `agent_call_01_plot.png`  

provenance: computed
